overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a vibrant tropical Caribbean town with colorful colonial architecture. The camera moves steadily through paved streets, passing vehicles and NPCs, transitioning from an urban intersection to a waterfront dirt path near a building with a prominent 'DR. HALFMAIN' sign.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking down a sunlit paved street lined with colorful colonial architecture. A red building with wooden balconies dominates the left side while a white building with a water tower sits ahead. A blue vintage car passes by in the opposite direction around the 7-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with green residential building

events.description: passes close by the green building porch, temporarily filling the frame

agents.ego_description: turns left at the intersection and walks along the sidewalk passing a green building with a wooden porch

notable_agents.action: man standing on the wooden porch of the green building, facing the street

entered.detail: weathered green building with wooden balcony and decorative concrete railings
two-story mint green building with striped awnings and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at the intersection, revealing a mint green building with a wooden porch where an NPC stands watching the street. The perspective shifts to show the side street with colorful residential buildings as the camera passes close by the porch structure.

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the street passing various colorful buildings and approaching the waterfront corner

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt walking on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: peach-colored building with red trim and barred windows
small commercial building with green paint and signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the residential street, the camera passes a peach-colored building on the right and approaches a corner where the street opens toward the waterfront. The mint green building recedes into the background as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dirt path with construction debris

events.description: turns toward waterfront and transitions from paved asphalt to dirt path
green car visible parked near the waterfront fence

agents.ego_description: walks along the dirt waterfront path toward the Dr. Halfmain building, navigating around construction debris

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt walking ahead on the dirt path toward the water
green car parked near the waterfront fence

entered.detail: weathered concrete building with large yellow DR. HALFMAIN sign and external metal staircase
green metal fence running along the water's edge
calm body of water visible beyond the fence with distant shoreline
piles of concrete rubble, broken blocks, and construction materials scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a waterfront area with a dirt path replacing the paved street. The camera approaches the prominent Dr. Halfmain building with its distinctive yellow signage and external staircase. A green metal fence lines the water's edge where a green car is parked, and construction debris litters the ground near the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a vibrant Caribbean town, transitioning from a sunlit paved intersection to a rustic waterfront path. It begins by moving down a street lined with colorful colonial architecture, passing a red building with wooden balconies as a blue vintage car drives by in the opposite direction. As the camera turns left at the intersection, the view shifts past a mint green building with a wooden porch and an observing NPC, moving deeper into a residential area characterized by peach-colored facades. The scene then opens up as the paved road gives way to a dirt path leading toward the water's edge. Finally, the camera approaches the Dr. Halfmain building with its yellow signage and external staircase, passing a green metal fence and a parked car amidst scattered construction debris.
